blocks.body: Question Tags — Short tags for confirmation and checking.

{ "title": "11. Short synopsis", "items": [ "Question tags are short questions at the end of the sentence for confirmation.", "Basic rule: positive sentence + negative tag / negative + positive.", "With to be: She is happy, isn't she? / She isn't happy, is she?", "With do/does/did: You like it, don't you? / You don't like it, do you?", "With modals: we repeat the modal — She can swim, can't she?", "With have: You have seen it, haven't you? (Perfect) / You have a car, haven't you? (got)", "Exceptions: I am → aren't I? / Imperatives → will you? / Let's → shall we?", "In the tag: use a pronoun (he/she/it/they), do not repeat the noun.", "Intonation: falling ↘ — confirmation, rising ↗ — a real question. ", "Usage: to confirm, start a conversation, courtesy." ] }
